rulings.Case Title: COURTHOUSE VENTURES INC VS. EDWARD NOVAK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 28, 2018, Line 4. DEFENDANT EDWARD NOVAK'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment. GRANTED, subject to (1) Defendant posting $4,450 with the Court no later than August 28, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. (approximate amount of daily damages accrued due to delay in seeking relief and bringing this case to resolution); and (2) thereafter Defendant filing an answer no later than August 28, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. =(501/CFH)
